pages.text: 咘咘已经是大宝宝了，可是她还穿着尿片。每次妈妈说"咘咘，我们去坐小马桶吧？"咘咘就摇头："不要不要！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small white baby bunny (snow-white fur, pink inner ears, big brown eyes) in a light pink summer dress with pink bow on head, shaking head vigorously with arms crossed, a black-and-white spotted cow (Tina mama) in light spring floral dress pointing toward a cute colorful small potty chair nearby, bright sunny bathroom with spring flowers on windowsill, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 小马桶是粉色的，上面还有小兔子的图案。可是咘咘觉得它好奇怪，不想坐上去。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute pink toddler potty chair with bunny pattern on it sitting in a bright cheerful bathroom, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress standing far away peeking at it suspiciously from behind a door, spring sunlight coming through window, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 豆豆来找咘咘玩。"咘咘，我已经不穿尿片啦！我会自己去坐小马桶，可厉害了！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small brown hedgehog (Doudou) with warm brown eyes and tiny spikes, wearing a green summer T-shirt, proudly puffing out chest and pointing at himself, talking to a white baby bunny in pink summer dress who looks surprised, sunny spring garden, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 慢慢也说："我也会哦。虽然我走得慢，但是每次想上厕所，我就慢慢走过去坐好。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small green turtle (Manman) with dark green shell, smiling gently and slowly walking toward a small blue potty chair, a white baby bunny watching with curious wide eyes, sunny spring meadow, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘有点着急了："可是⋯⋯我不知道什么时候该去坐呀。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress looking confused and slightly worried, a question mark floating above her head, hedgehog and turtle on either side looking at her supportively, bright spring outdoor scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Sam 爸爸笑着说："没关系，爸爸教你。我们每隔一会儿就去坐一下小马桶，坐一小会儿就好，不用急。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever (Sam papa) wearing a casual light cotton T-shirt, kneeling next to a white baby bunny in pink summer dress, holding up one finger explaining patiently with a warm smile, spring living room with green plants and sunlight, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 第一次，咘咘只是看了看小马桶。爸爸说："很好！看一看也是进步。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress cautiously leaning forward to look at a pink potty chair, golden retriever giving a thumbs up encouragingly, bright cheerful bathroom, a gold star sticker floating in the air, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 第二次，咘咘摸了摸小马桶。妈妈说："真棒！摸一摸也是进步。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress reaching out one paw to touch the pink potty chair, black-and-white cow in spring floral dress clapping hands gently, bright bathroom with a progress chart on wall showing one star, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 第三次，咘咘终于坐上去了！只坐了一小会儿，但是——"我坐上去啦！"咘咘好开心。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress sitting on the pink potty chair with a huge proud smile, arms raised in celebration, golden retriever and cow both cheering with arms up, confetti and stars around, bright cheerful bathroom, progress chart showing two stars, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: NOMI 做了一张小贴纸表。每次咘咘坐小马桶，就可以贴一颗星星。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon (gray-brown fur, black eye mask, ringed tail) in blue-and-white striped T-shirt holding up a colorful star sticker chart with some gold stars already placed, showing it to a white baby bunny who looks at it with excited sparkling eyes, spring living room, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 早上起床，坐一下小马桶。吃完饭，坐一下小马桶。出门之前，也坐一下。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, three scenes in one image: a white baby bunny in pajamas sitting on potty in morning sunlight, same bunny after a meal walking to potty, same bunny in pink summer dress sitting on potty before going out with a small backpack nearby, each scene with a clock showing different times, bright cheerful style, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 有时候坐上去什么也没有。爸爸说："没关系，下次再试。"咘咘点点头："下次再试！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress sitting on pink potty looking slightly disappointed, golden retriever in cotton T-shirt patting her head gently with a warm encouraging smile, speech bubble with 'next time', spring bathroom, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 有时候——成功啦！咘咘高兴得跳起来："我做到了我做到了！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress jumping up from potty with both arms raised high, the biggest happiest expression, sparkles and stars exploding around her, golden retriever and cow dancing and celebrating, sticker chart on wall now with many stars, bright joyful bathroom scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 贴纸表上的星星越来越多了。一颗、两颗、三颗⋯⋯哇，快要贴满了！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, close-up of a colorful star sticker chart almost full of gold stars, a white baby bunny's small paw placing the latest star sticker, raccoon in blue striped T-shirt watching proudly, warm spring light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 慢慢地，咘咘越来越厉害了。想上厕所的时候，她会自己说："我要去坐小马桶！"然后自己走过去。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress walking confidently and independently toward the pink potty chair with a determined happy expression, spring sunlit hallway, no diaper visible, the bunny looking grown-up and proud, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Tina 妈妈帮咘咘穿上了漂亮的小内裤，粉色的，上面有小星星。"不用穿尿片啦！咘咘长大了！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a black-and-white cow in spring floral dress holding up tiny cute pink underwear with star patterns, a white baby bunny looking at it with proud sparkling eyes, golden retriever and raccoon clapping in background, bright spring bedroom, celebratory feeling, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘笑得好开心。原来长大就是这样的呀——慢慢来，一步一步，每一次都是进步。记得哦：隔一会儿就去坐一下小马桶，坐一坐就好，不用急！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny in pink summer dress standing tall and proud with no diaper, surrounded by all friends - golden retriever, cow, raccoon, hedgehog, turtle, and a small red bird, everyone celebrating with spring flower petals falling, the bunny wearing her star-pattern underwear proudly, sticker chart fully complete on the wall behind, golden sunset spring light, the most warm and triumphant scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536
